projects.title: TechWave
projects.overview: A responsive podcast website built with pure HTML and vanilla CSS, implemented by converting Figma designs into code and optimized for multiple devices using media queries.

projects.title: English Janala
projects.overview: English Janala is a web app designed to help people learn English words in a simple and organized way.

projects.title: PAYoo
projects.overview: PAYoo is Mobile Financial Service (MFS) simulation app while learning JavaScript. This project is fully built by me as part of my practice of Javascript. password: 1234

projects.title: Keen Keeper
projects.overview: Keen Keeper is a relationship management web application designed to help users organize, track, and strengthen their connections with friends and acquaintances.

projects.title: AI Hub
projects.overview: It is An interactive web application designed to help users explore and purchase a wide range of AI tools. The platform fetches real-time data from APIs and presents AI products in a clean, user-friendly interface.

projects.title: Book Vibe
projects.overview: Introducing Book Vibe, A Simple Way to Track Your Reading Journey. I recently built Book Vibe, a reading management web app designed to help users organize and track their books in a clean and intuitive way.

projects.title: Digitool
projects.overview: Digital is service marketplace designed to make buying digital products safer and easier. my goal was to create a reliable, user-friendly solution where users can confidently explore and purchase digital services.

projects.title: Dragon News
projects.overview: In this project  I focused on integrating Better Auth with Next.js and MongoDB — getting comfortable with sign up, log in, log out, session management, and protected routes in a real app environment.

projects.title: Bake and Cook
projects.overview: I recently built a food ordering web application where users can browse meals, explore recipes, and manage their cart — all in one place.

projects.title: QurbaniHat
projects.overview: QurbaniHat is a full-stack online livestock booking platform built for Eid ul-Adha, making it easier than ever for people in Bangladesh to find and book their Qurbani animals online.

projects.title: MediQueue — Tutor Booking System
projects.overview: MediQueue is a full-stack tutor booking web application where students can browse verified tutors, book online or offline learning sessions, and manage their scheduled classes — all from one place.

projects.title: RecipeHub - 🍳
projects.overview: RecipeHub is a full-stack recipe-sharing platform where users can discover, share, and manage their favorite recipes. Users can browse recipes by category, save favorites, and many more. Admins get a dedicated dashboard to manage users, recipes, and reports.
